description.value:
Requirements You're adjacent to a creature that isn't immune to bleed damage and died within the last minute.

You dip your fingers into the gushing wounds of the fallen, using their ichor to mask your face in a visceral ritual that pays homage to the fallen while calming yourself for in the din of battle. For 1 minute, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Intimidation checks to [[/act demoralize]], a +1 status bonus to Will saves against emotion effects, and at the end of your turn, reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened] condition by 2 instead of 1.
